## What happened

<!-- A clear description of the bug. What did you do, and what did glixos
or glix do that you didn't expect? -->

## What you expected

<!-- What did you think would happen instead? -->

## Reproduction

<!-- Smallest sequence of commands that reproduces the bug. If it involves a
specific package or host config, paste the relevant `glix.toml` section. -->

```
glix ...
```

## Environment

<!-- Run `cat /etc/glixos-release` and paste the output. If that file does
not exist, paste `glix version` and the output of `nixos-version` instead. -->

```
# /etc/glixos-release
```

```
$ glix doctor
```

For glix bugs: stderr from the failing command. -->
